requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Chile
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——智利无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——智利無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Chile does not operate a horizontal RoHS-style regulation restricting hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a condition of market access. There is no Chilean equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) for LED luminaires. Chile's product approval centres on SEC electrical safety certification, not substance restriction. Substance controls that exist in Chile are sector-specific (e.g., general hazardous-substance and chemical handling, mercury controls under the Minamata Convention to which Chile is a party) rather than an EEE-wide homogeneous-material restriction. Manufacturers should not assume an affirmative RoHS test is mandated for Chilean market entry, but should verify any product-specific or contractual substance requirements.
summary.zh: 智利不实行横向 RoHS 式法规，将限制电气电子设备中的有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE、邻苯二甲酸酯）作为市场准入条件。智利没有相当于欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的针对 LED 灯具的制度。智利的产品核准以 SEC 电气安全认证为核心，而非物质限制。智利现有的物质管控为分行业性质（如一般有害物质与化学品处理、智利作为缔约方的《水俣公约》下的汞管控），而非覆盖 EEE 全品类均质材料的限制。制造商不应假定智利市场准入强制要求肯定性的 RoHS 检测，但应核实任何产品特定或合同性物质要求。
summary.zht: 智利不實行橫向 RoHS 式法規，將限制電氣電子設備中的有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE、鄰苯二甲酸酯）作為市場准入條件。智利沒有相當於歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的針對 LED 燈具的制度。智利的產品核准以 SEC 電氣安全認證為核心，而非物質限制。智利現有的物質管控為分行業性質（如一般有害物質與化學品處理、智利作為締約方的《水俁公約》下的汞管控），而非覆蓋 EEE 全品類均質材料的限制。製造商不應假定智利市場准入強制要求肯定性的 RoHS 檢測，但應核實任何產品特定或合同性物質要求。

standards_or_laws: Chile — no horizontal RoHS-equivalent restriction for EEE (no Chilean counterpart to EU Directive 2011/65/EU)
Minamata Convention on Mercury (Chile is a party — sector mercury controls, not an EEE-wide RoHS)

summary.en: China's GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE) covers 6 substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same thresholds as EU RoHS, and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. As of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list. China therefore does operate a substance-disclosure regime, whereas Chile does not have a comparable horizontal EEE substance-restriction regime.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求）涵盖 6 项物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。截至 2026 年，4 项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。因此中国确有物质披露制度，而智利没有可比的横向 EEE 物质限制制度。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求）涵蓋 6 項物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。截至 2026 年，4 項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。因此中國確有物質披露制度，而智利沒有可比的橫向 EEE 物質限制制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Here the direction of the gap is reversed relative to the EU comparison: Chile imposes NO horizontal RoHS substance restriction or disclosure-label requirement, while China DOES operate GB/T 26572 + the China RoHS 2 disclosure label. A Chinese manufacturer already complying with China RoHS therefore generally meets or exceeds any substance expectation Chile imposes at the regulatory level, because Chile has no equivalent mandate. Practically: (1) no Chilean RoHS test or RoHS DoC is required for SEC market access; (2) the China RoHS disclosure label is a CN-market artefact and is not required for Chile; (3) however, Chilean importers/retailers or downstream contracts may still ask for substance data voluntarily, and mercury-containing products are subject to Minamata-related controls. Verify any contractual or product-specific substance requirement rather than a horizontal legal one.
gap.zh: 此处差距方向与欧盟对照相反：智利不施加横向 RoHS 物质限制或披露标签要求，而中国确实实行 GB/T 26572 + 中国 RoHS 2 披露标签。因此，已符合中国 RoHS 的中国制造商在法规层面通常达到或超过智利的任何物质预期，因为智利无对应义务。实际上：（1）SEC 市场准入不要求智利 RoHS 检测或 RoHS 符合性声明；（2）中国 RoHS 披露标签为中国市场产物，智利不要求；（3）但智利进口商/零售商或下游合同仍可能自愿索取物质数据，且含汞产品受《水俣公约》相关管控。请核实任何合同性或产品特定物质要求，而非横向法律要求。
gap.zht: 此處差距方向與歐盟對照相反：智利不施加橫向 RoHS 物質限制或披露標籤要求，而中國確實實行 GB/T 26572 + 中國 RoHS 2 披露標籤。因此，已符合中國 RoHS 的中國製造商在法規層面通常達到或超過智利的任何物質預期，因為智利無對應義務。實際上：（1）SEC 市場准入不要求智利 RoHS 檢測或 RoHS 符合性聲明；（2）中國 RoHS 披露標籤為中國市場產物，智利不要求；（3）但智利進口商/零售商或下游合同仍可能自願索取物質數據，且含汞產品受《水俁公約》相關管控。請核實任何合同性或產品特定物質要求，而非橫向法律要求。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no horizontal RoHS) — Chile has no EEE-wide RoHS-style substance restriction or disclosure-label requirement for LED luminaires; sector mercury controls apply under Minamata
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile has no horizontal RoHS-style substance-restriction or disclosure-label regime for LED luminaires — unlike China's GB/T 26572 + China RoHS 2 disclosure label and unlike EU RoHS. No Chilean RoHS test or DoC is required for SEC market access. A manufacturer already meeting China RoHS generally exceeds Chile's regulatory expectation. Watch for voluntary buyer/importer substance requests and mercury controls under the Minamata Convention; verify product-specific or contractual requirements rather than a horizontal legal one.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利对 LED 灯具无横向 RoHS 式物质限制或披露标签制度——与中国 GB/T 26572 + 中国 RoHS 2 披露标签不同，也与欧盟 RoHS 不同。SEC 市场准入不要求智利 RoHS 检测或符合性声明。已满足中国 RoHS 的制造商在法规层面通常超过智利预期。请留意买方/进口商自愿的物质数据索取及《水俣公约》下的汞管控；请核实产品特定或合同性要求，而非横向法律要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利對 LED 燈具無橫向 RoHS 式物質限制或披露標籤制度——與中國 GB/T 26572 + 中國 RoHS 2 披露標籤不同，也與歐盟 RoHS 不同。SEC 市場准入不要求智利 RoHS 檢測或符合性聲明。已滿足中國 RoHS 的製造商在法規層面通常超過智利預期。請留意買方/進口商自願的物質數據索取及《水俁公約》下的汞管控；請核實產品特定或合同性要求，而非橫向法律要求。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-Style Duty in Chile
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / SVHC 供应链通报——智利无 REACH 式义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / SVHC 供應鏈通報——智利無 REACH 式義務

summary.en: Chile does not impose a REACH-style Substance of Very High Concern (SVHC) supply-chain notification obligation (no equivalent to REACH Article 33 / the ECHA Candidate List / the SCIP database). There is no Chilean legal duty for an LED luminaire supplier to proactively notify business customers or consumers when an article contains a listed substance above 0.1% w/w, because Chile does not maintain a REACH-equivalent candidate list for articles. Chilean chemical regulation focuses on classification, labelling, transport, and handling of hazardous chemicals/substances (workplace and substance-handling rules) rather than article-level SVHC communication. Manufacturers should still meet general Chilean chemical safety and any GHS-aligned classification/labelling obligations applicable to chemicals as such.
summary.zh: 智利不施加 REACH 式高度关注物质（SVHC）供应链通报义务（无相当于 REACH 第 33 条 / ECHA 候选清单 / SCIP 数据库者）。智利无法律义务要求 LED 灯具供应商在物品含列明物质超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报商业客户或消费者，因为智利不维护针对物品的 REACH 式候选清单。智利化学品法规侧重危险化学品/物质的分类、标签、运输及处理（工作场所及物质处理规则），而非物品层面的 SVHC 通报。制造商仍应满足一般智利化学品安全及适用于化学品本身的任何 GHS 对齐分类/标签义务。
summary.zht: 智利不施加 REACH 式高度關注物質（SVHC）供應鏈通報義務（無相當於 REACH 第 33 條 / ECHA 候選清單 / SCIP 數據庫者）。智利無法律義務要求 LED 燈具供應商在物品含列明物質超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報商業客戶或消費者，因為智利不維護針對物品的 REACH 式候選清單。智利化學品法規側重危險化學品/物質的分類、標籤、運輸及處理（工作場所及物質處理規則），而非物品層面的 SVHC 通報。製造商仍應滿足一般智利化學品安全及適用於化學品本身的任何 GHS 對齊分類/標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: Chile — no REACH-style SVHC article notification duty (no equivalent to REACH Article 33, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP database)
Chilean hazardous-chemical classification/labelling and handling rules (GHS-aligned, applicable to chemicals as such, not article-level SVHC communication)

summary.en: China likewise does not have a direct REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC notification equivalent. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020, Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) for new substance registration and GB 30981-2020 (classification and labelling of chemicals). Neither creates a duty to notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w. On this point China and Chile are similar: both lack a REACH-style article SVHC duty.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接相当于 REACH 第 33 条的物品层面 SVHC 通报义务。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年，《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》）用于新物质登记，及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签）。两者均未产生在物品中 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时通报 B2B 客户的义务。在此点上中国与智利相似：两者均无 REACH 式物品 SVHC 义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接相當於 REACH 第 33 條的物品層面 SVHC 通報義務。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年，《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》）用於新物質登記，及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤）。兩者均未產生在物品中 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時通報 B2B 客戶的義務。在此點上中國與智利相似：兩者均無 REACH 式物品 SVHC 義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Both Chile and China lack a REACH-style article-level SVHC notification duty, so there is no Chile-specific SVHC supply-chain obligation for a Chinese LED luminaire exporter to add — unlike for EU export, where REACH Article 33 and SCIP apply. The residual considerations are: (1) general Chilean hazardous-chemical classification/labelling/handling rules apply to chemicals as such (not to articles), so finished luminaires are largely outside this; (2) Chilean importers, retailers, or international buyers may contractually request substance data even though the law does not compel it; (3) mercury-containing components fall under Minamata-related controls. The compliance burden here is materially lower than the EU REACH regime — but manufacturers should confirm no contractual or sector-specific substance-reporting clause applies to their shipment.
gap.zh: 智利与中国均无 REACH 式物品层面 SVHC 通报义务，故中国 LED 灯具出口商无需添加智利特有的 SVHC 供应链义务——与出口欧盟不同（欧盟适用 REACH 第 33 条及 SCIP）。剩余考虑为：（1）一般智利危险化学品分类/标签/处理规则适用于化学品本身（而非物品），故成品灯具基本不在此范围；（2）智利进口商、零售商或国际买方虽法律不强制，仍可能合同性索取物质数据；（3）含汞部件受《水俣公约》相关管控。此处合规负担明显低于欧盟 REACH 制度——但制造商应确认其货物不适用任何合同性或分行业物质报告条款。
gap.zht: 智利與中國均無 REACH 式物品層面 SVHC 通報義務，故中國 LED 燈具出口商無需添加智利特有的 SVHC 供應鏈義務——與出口歐盟不同（歐盟適用 REACH 第 33 條及 SCIP）。剩餘考慮為：（1）一般智利危險化學品分類/標籤/處理規則適用於化學品本身（而非物品），故成品燈具基本不在此範圍；（2）智利進口商、零售商或國際買方雖法律不強制，仍可能合同性索取物質數據；（3）含汞部件受《水俁公約》相關管控。此處合規負擔明顯低於歐盟 REACH 制度——但製造商應確認其貨物不適用任何合同性或分行業物質報告條款。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Chile has no REACH-style article SVHC notification duty (no Article 33 / Candidate List / SCIP equivalent); GHS-aligned chemical rules apply to chemicals as such
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH-style article-level SVHC notification duty either

source.publisher: Gobierno de Chile (Ministerio de Salud — hazardous chemical classification/labelling framework)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile has no REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty (no Article 33 / ECHA Candidate List / SCIP equivalent), and neither does China — so there is no Chile-specific SVHC step to add for a Chinese exporter, unlike EU export. General Chilean hazardous-chemical rules are GHS-aligned and apply to chemicals as such, not finished articles. Watch for voluntary buyer/importer substance requests, contractual clauses, and Minamata mercury controls; verify these rather than assuming a horizontal legal SVHC duty.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利无 REACH 式物品层面 SVHC 供应链通报义务（无第 33 条 / ECHA 候选清单 / SCIP 对应者），中国亦无——故对中国出口商不存在智利特有的 SVHC 步骤，与出口欧盟不同。一般智利危险化学品规则与 GHS 对齐，适用于化学品本身而非成品物品。请留意买方/进口商自愿的物质数据索取、合同条款及《水俣公约》汞管控；请核实这些而非假定横向法律 SVHC 义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利無 REACH 式物品層面 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務（無第 33 條 / ECHA 候選清單 / SCIP 對應者），中國亦無——故對中國出口商不存在智利特有的 SVHC 步驟，與出口歐盟不同。一般智利危險化學品規則與 GHS 對齊，適用於化學品本身而非成品物品。請留意買方/進口商自願的物質數據索取、合同條款及《水俁公約》汞管控；請核實這些而非假定橫向法律 SVHC 義務。

requirement_topic.en: SEC Certification Process and Technical File vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: SEC 认证流程与技术文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: SEC 認證流程與技術文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: SEC certification for LED luminaires in Chile requires: (1) the product to be certified by an SEC-authorized certification body against the applicable NCh/IEC safety standards (e.g., NCh adoptions of IEC 60598 for luminaires, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps); (2) submission of a technical file with test reports from an SEC-accepted laboratory; (3) issuance of the SEC certificate and use of the SEC seal/marking; (4) registration of the certified product so it appears in the SEC product registry, after which it may be lawfully marketed and sold in Chile; (5) for in-scope products, the Ministry of Energy efficiency label; (6) for wireless products, separate SUBTEL approval. Importation and sale typically require a Chilean importer/representative responsible for placing the certified product on the market. The certifier-led third-party process (not pure self-declaration) is the standard route.
summary.zh: 智利 LED 灯具的 SEC 认证要求：（1）产品由 SEC 授权认证机构依据适用 NCh/IEC 安全标准认证（如灯具的 IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯的 IEC 62560 的 NCh 采纳版）；（2）提交含 SEC 接受实验室检测报告的技术文件；（3）颁发 SEC 证书并使用 SEC 认证标志；（4）将认证产品登记，使其出现在 SEC 产品注册中，此后方可在智利合法销售；（5）对适用产品须有能源部能效标签；（6）对无线产品须另行 SUBTEL 核准。进口与销售通常需要负责将认证产品投放市场的智利进口商/代表。由认证机构主导的第三方流程（而非纯自我声明）为标准路径。
summary.zht: 智利 LED 燈具的 SEC 認證要求：（1）產品由 SEC 授權認證機構依據適用 NCh/IEC 安全標準認證（如燈具的 IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈的 IEC 62560 的 NCh 採納版）；（2）提交含 SEC 接受實驗室檢測報告的技術文件；（3）頒發 SEC 證書並使用 SEC 認證標誌；（4）將認證產品登記，使其出現在 SEC 產品注冊中，此後方可在智利合法銷售；（5）對適用產品須有能源部能效標籤；（6）對無線產品須另行 SUBTEL 核准。進口與銷售通常需要負責將認證產品投放市場的智利進口商/代表。由認證機構主導的第三方流程（而非純自我聲明）為標準路徑。

standards_or_laws: SEC mandatory product certification regime (Chile — certifier-led third-party certification + SEC seal + product registry)
IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 (adopted as NCh by INN — safety basis for SEC certification)
Ministry of Energy efficiency label (in-scope products) + SUBTEL approval (wireless products)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for residential luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body such as CQC. Voluntary CQC certification exists for products outside mandatory CCC. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require SRRC type approval. CCC certification bodies and reports are specific to the Chinese regime and are not recognised by the Chilean SEC certifiers.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证。对非强制 CCC 范畴的产品存在自愿性 CQC 认证。具备无线功能的灯具还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 认证机构及报告针对中国制度，不被智利 SEC 认证机构所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證。對非強制 CCC 範疇的產品存在自願性 CQC 認證。具備無線功能的燈具還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 認證機構及報告針對中國制度，不被智利 SEC 認證機構所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Chilean SEC certification and Chinese CCC are both certifier-led third-party regimes, so the process shape is closer than the EU's self-declaration route — but they run in parallel with no mutual recognition: separate certificates, test reports, certifiers, and product registries are needed for each market. Key Chile-specific points: (1) certification must be done by an SEC-authorized body and the product entered in the SEC registry before lawful sale; (2) IEC/NCh safety reports must be acceptable to the SEC certifier — Chinese CCC reports are generally not directly transferable, though shared IEC 60598/62560 test physics can reduce re-testing; (3) a Chilean importer/local representative is typically required to place the product on the market; (4) the Ministry of Energy efficiency label and (for wireless) SUBTEL approval are separate obligations. Unlike the EU, there is no RoHS DoC, no REACH/SCIP, and no EU Authorised Representative concept — but the SEC certificate + seal + registry entry are mandatory.
gap.zh: 智利 SEC 认证与中国 CCC 同为认证机构主导的第三方制度，故流程形态比欧盟自我声明路径更接近——但两者并行且不互认：各市场需分别的证书、检测报告、认证机构及产品注册。智利特有要点：（1）须由 SEC 授权机构认证并在合法销售前将产品录入 SEC 注册；（2）IEC/NCh 安全报告须为 SEC 认证机构所接受——中国 CCC 报告一般不可直接转用，但共用的 IEC 60598/62560 检测物理基础可减少重新检测；（3）通常需要智利进口商/本地代表将产品投放市场；（4）能源部能效标签及（对无线产品）SUBTEL 核准为独立义务。与欧盟不同，无 RoHS 符合性声明、无 REACH/SCIP、无欧盟授权代表概念——但 SEC 证书 + 认证标志 + 注册录入为强制要求。
gap.zht: 智利 SEC 認證與中國 CCC 同為認證機構主導的第三方制度，故流程形態比歐盟自我聲明路徑更接近——但兩者並行且不互認：各市場需分別的證書、檢測報告、認證機構及產品注冊。智利特有要點：（1）須由 SEC 授權機構認證並在合法銷售前將產品錄入 SEC 注冊；（2）IEC/NCh 安全報告須為 SEC 認證機構所接受——中國 CCC 報告一般不可直接轉用，但共用的 IEC 60598/62560 檢測物理基礎可減少重新檢測；（3）通常需要智利進口商/本地代表將產品投放市場；（4）能源部能效標籤及（對無線產品）SUBTEL 核准為獨立義務。與歐盟不同，無 RoHS 符合性聲明、無 REACH/SCIP、無歐盟授權代表概念——但 SEC 證書 + 認證標誌 + 注冊錄入為強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC certification by an SEC-authorized body, SEC seal, and product registry entry required before lawful sale in Chile; Ministry of Energy label and SUBTEL approval apply where in scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chilean SEC certification for LED luminaires is a certifier-led third-party process: certify against NCh/IEC 60598/62560 with an SEC-authorized body, file test reports from an SEC-accepted lab, obtain the SEC seal, and enter the SEC product registry before lawful sale; add the Ministry of Energy efficiency label and SUBTEL approval where in scope. SEC and CCC are parallel non-mutual regimes — Chinese CCC reports are generally not directly transferable, though shared IEC test physics can reduce re-testing. There is no RoHS DoC, REACH/SCIP, or EU-style Authorised Representative requirement in Chile, but a Chilean importer/representative is typically needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利 LED 灯具的 SEC 认证为认证机构主导的第三方流程：由 SEC 授权机构依据 NCh/IEC 60598/62560 认证、提交 SEC 接受实验室的检测报告、取得 SEC 认证标志，并在合法销售前录入 SEC 产品注册；在适用范围内须加能源部能效标签及 SUBTEL 核准。SEC 与 CCC 为并行非互认制度——中国 CCC 报告一般不可直接转用，但共用 IEC 检测物理基础可减少重新检测。智利无 RoHS 符合性声明、REACH/SCIP 或欧盟式授权代表要求，但通常需要智利进口商/代表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利 LED 燈具的 SEC 認證為認證機構主導的第三方流程：由 SEC 授權機構依據 NCh/IEC 60598/62560 認證、提交 SEC 接受實驗室的檢測報告、取得 SEC 認證標誌，並在合法銷售前錄入 SEC 產品注冊；在適用範圍內須加能源部能效標籤及 SUBTEL 核准。SEC 與 CCC 為並行非互認制度——中國 CCC 報告一般不可直接轉用，但共用 IEC 檢測物理基礎可減少重新檢測。智利無 RoHS 符合性聲明、REACH/SCIP 或歐盟式授權代表要求，但通常需要智利進口商/代表。
